The '''''Bosphon Forever''''' belonged to the [[Bosph (species)|Bosph]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Bora Boru]], who took it into his possession by placing his [[glyph]] on it. The ''Bosphon Forever'' was covered with glyphs of ownership on the exterior and coated with glyphs rendering stories and philosophies associated with Bosph mythology and tradition. The ship functioned almost as a temple to the lost lore of the Bosph and their destroyed [[Bosph/Legends|homeworld]], and Bora Boru rarely allowed anyone to enter the ship unguarded.<ref name="SOR" />
